title: UACP Vector Clock
description: A vector clock recording per-device logical timestamps for a UACP conversation. Keys are device UUIDs (v4); values are non-negative integers representing the device's event counter. Implementations MUST enforce CLOCK_OVERFLOW: no slot may exceed 2^63 - 1 (9223372036854775807). JSON Schema cannot reliably enforce uint64 bounds due to IEEE-754 precision limits, so overflow enforcement is normative at the implementation layer (see spec/extensions/uacp-vector-clock.md).
